title: Resume
text:
Student at Brigham Young University - Idaho


Studying Data science at Brigham Young University - Idaho



August 2023 - August 2025 Voluntary Religious Missionary
The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter Day Saints

Established relationships within 5 communities and led religious efforts to teach principles of the Gospel of Jesus Christ
Promoted positive relations with 1-3 coworkers from vast cultural and ethnic backgrounds in multiple shared house settings
Supervised groups of 9-26 missionaries in day-to-day work to sustain effective use of time and obedience to missionary standards

June 2023 - August 2023 Lot Attendant
Insight motors

Coordinated with marketing department and transported 7-10 vehicles weekly to desired locations
Maintained highest quality of cleanliness in 50+ vehicles held on lot
Serviced vehicles with minor issues to ensure safe use and improved durability

‘2023’ Crew Member
Little Caesars

Interacted with 4-5 coworkers in high-stress scenarios, fulfilling orders and ensuring high-quality product
Managed cleanliness of store and ensured floors, counters, and equipment were sanitized
Communicated needs of each station and insured 5 stations were run efficiently at all times





English(Native), Malagasy(Conversational)
Profficient in Python, SQL, R

title: Isaac Newtons’s CV
text:
Standing on the shoulders of giants


Laws of motion, gravitation, minting coins, disliking Robert Hooke



Cooling, power series, optics, alchemy, planetary motions, apples.
